heroTitle: Quiet plants, careful hands, slow healing.
heroText: Balms, infusions, and oils shaped by traditional knowledge, clean ingredients, and a calmer pace.
philosophyTitle: Not beauty. Healing rooted in nature.
philosophyText: Each remedy begins with listening to the body and the season: bitter leaves, gentle carrier oils, clay, soil, and low sun.
shopIntro: Small batches, clear use, deep roots.
aboutBody: The brand is built around folk knowledge carried by healers, families, and women who knew how to read a plant by scent, touch, and season. This is a place for simple materials, clean language, and products made to support the body rather than hide it.
newsletterText: Short guides, seasonal herbs, and new remedies.
